summary: Iteration 28 - Refinement pass testing complete. All three refinement features verified: (1) Notification panel grouping with '+ N simili' label working correctly - tested with real data showing '+ 4 simili', '+ 3 simili', '+ 1 simile' (singular/plural Italian correct). (2) Communication context panel tightened - shows 'Richiede la tua azione' with action label in amber block, SITUAZIONE/COSA FARE sections, ENTE with who-acts/SPID/proof status, agent card only shows for in_progress status. (3) Official Step 'Accedi e continua' purple explanation box code verified - shows bg-purple-50/50 box with Lock icon and 'Questo passaggio avviene sul portale ufficiale dell'ente' text before the button when ready_for_submission + requires_user_direct_step + credentials_required.
critical_code_review_comments: NotificationPanel.jsx: Grouping logic correctly groups consecutive same-title notifications (max 5 per group) with proper Italian singular/plural ('simile' vs 'simili')
EmailCenterPage.jsx: Context panel correctly shows agent card only when agent.status === 'in_progress', tightened UI with combined who-acts badge and action label

PracticeDetailPage.jsx: Purple explanation box (bg-purple-50/50) with Lock icon correctly placed before 'Accedi e continua' button, only shows when isReady && requires_user_direct_step && credentials_required
Communication empty state shows guided message: 'Le comunicazioni vengono create automaticamente durante le pratiche, oppure puoi crearne una manualmente.'
seed_data_creation: Used existing practices and notifications from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 tested refinement pass features: (1) Notification grouping - consecutive same-title notifications grouped with '+ N simili' label, max 5 per group, singular 'simile' for 2 items, plural 'simili' for 3+. (2) Communication context panel - agent card only shows for in_progress status, 'Richiede la tua azione' badge with action label in amber block, SITUAZIONE/COSA FARE/ENTE sections working. (3) Official Step auth flow - purple explanation box (bg-purple-50/50) with Lock icon shows before 'Accedi e continua' button when practice is ready_for_submission with requires_user_direct_step and credentials_required. All UI in Italian.

details: Consecutive same-title notifications grouped correctly
Shows '+ 4 simili' for groups of 5 items
Shows '+ 3 simili' for groups of 4 items
Shows '+ 1 simile' for groups of 2 items (singular Italian)
Max 5 items per group enforced
Different notification types displayed: Nuova Pratica Creata, Pratica Completata, Pratica Inviata
PRATICA COLLEGATA section shows practice name and client
Status badge with step indicator (e.g., 'Escalation Passo 0 di 6')
'Richiede la tua azione' badge with action label 'Intervieni' in amber block
SITUAZIONE section shows headline (e.g., 'Pratica bloccata')
COSA FARE block shows guidance text
ENTE section shows entity name, 'Chi agisce: Tu', SPID indicator, 'Ricevuta attesa'
Agent card NOT visible when practice is blocked (correct - only shows for in_progress)
4 stat cards displayed: RICHIEDONO AZIONE (18), INVIATE (2), BLOCCATE (5), TOTALI (33)
Purple explanation box uses bg-purple-50/50 background
Lock icon displayed with text 'Questo passaggio avviene sul portale ufficiale dell'ente'
Secondary text: 'Dopo l'accesso potrai completare l'invio. Herion non conserva le tue credenziali.'
'Accedi e continua' button with data-testid='auth-step-btn'
Only shows when: isReady && requires_user_direct_step && credentials_required
Note: Could not find practice in ready_for_submission status with required conditions in test data to visually verify
Login with admin@aic.it / Admin123! successful
Dashboard loads with notification bell visible
Sidebar navigation to Comunicazione works
Practice list and detail pages accessible
